items.statcast_observation: Starling Marte produced the hardest tracked Royals contact: 108.6 mph at a -15.0 degree launch angle.
items.summary: The Royals lost to the Texas Rangers, KC 4, TEX 6. Jac Caglianone led the night, 4-5 | 2B, K, RBI in the latest Royals game. Starling Marte supplied the loudest Royals contact at 108.6 mph.
items.title: Royals vs Rangers Recap
